sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106014" key="turoco/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῡρο-ξόος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ξέω</etym>) <sense id="n106014.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scraping cheese,</tr_> Sch.D ll.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg001.perseus-grc1:11:639" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.639</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
